name: abstain_low_confidence
description: Low-confidence NO LONGER abstains (owner decision 2026-06-19): the implicit-abstain gate that demoted a validator-approved verdict when the LLM self-reported confidence below CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD was REMOVED — self-reported confidence is uncalibrated and demoting an otherwise-valid verdict on it 'murks the waters'. This case pins the NEW behavior: a validator-approved Compliant narrative with confidence=0.2 SHIPS as Compliant (accepted, not needs_review). The validator + the abstain contract (genuine contradiction / no authoritative standard) remain the precision gates; a passing verdict is no longer second-guessed on a confidence number. proposal.confidence is still recorded for telemetry.

ccis_row.guidance: The organization establishes conditions for group and role membership.
ccis_row.procedures: Examine documented conditions for group / role membership.

tagged_evidence:
## Tagged evidence
- USD00077777 Example System Access Control Plan Rev A — mentions group membership in passing; does not enumerate conditions or approvers.

llm_stub_proposals.narrative: Examined USD00077777 Example System Access Control Plan Rev A; confirmed via section 2 that conditions for group and role membership are documented in the plan.
